title: Source Scanner
purpose: Regex-based Level 1 structural scanner. Walks source files per language and emits StructuralMethod[] with paramCount, visibility, multi-line signature support, and class context.
module_context: Level 1 of the pseudo-db two-level indexing pipeline. Runs on every pre-commit via bin/structural-index.ts. Intentionally cheap — no AST, no LLM.

steps.content: Return 0 if params is empty or whitespace-only
Walk the string char-by-char tracking depth of <, (, {, [ brackets
Track string state for ', ", and backtick (with escape char handling)
Count top-level commas (depth 0, not in string)
